title: thlaspi alpinum
intro: Thlaspi alpinum, also known as alpine penny cress, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a wild crucifer with a rich history of use in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi alpinum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi alpinum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
